pageSubtitle: PSU interviews and core manufacturing/thermal M.Tech strategies for GATE ME.
bannerText: Connect with ME mentors working at ONGC, IOCL, BARC, or pursuing M.Tech in Design at top IITs.

topics.title: M.Tech Admissions (Design & Thermal)
topics.description: Navigating COAP and CCMT for Mechanical streams.
points: Machine Design and Thermal Engineering remain the most competitive.
Consider interdisciplinary branches like Aerospace or Industrial Engineering.
Keep track of 'Accept & Freeze' rules carefully during COAP rounds.

topics.title: Maharatna PSU Interviews
topics.description: Crack technical rounds at ONGC, IOCL, NTPC, GAIL.
points: Fluid Mechanics and Thermodynamics are heavily tested.
Be prepared to draw T-S, P-V diagrams for various cycles on the spot.
Have a deep understanding of your B.Tech project and its practical applications.

topics.title: BARC & ISRO Specific Prep
topics.description: Scientific officer interviews require a different approach.
points: Interviews can last 45-60 minutes focusing purely on core concepts.
You will be asked to choose your top 4-5 favorite subjects—choose wisely.
Focus on derivations, basic physics, and 'why' things happen.

topics.title: Written Tests for MS/Ph.D.
topics.description: Securing research seats in top institutions.
points: Engineering Mathematics is critical for passing written screening tests.
SOPs should highlight knowledge of software like ANSYS, SolidWorks, or MATLAB.
Familiarize yourself with the professor's recent publications.
